results.output:
𝔸1.0.tic-tac-toe-spec@2026-02-27
γ≔game-specification

⟦Ω:Meta⟧{
  sender≜@spec-agent
  receiver≜@consumer-agent
  intent≜inform
  id≜"ttt-spec-001"
  timestamp≜1740614400
  reply_to≜"none"
  protocol≜1
}

⟦Σ:Types⟧{
  Player≜{X, O}
  Cell≜{Empty, Marked(Player)}
  Position≜{(r,c) | r∈{0,1,2} ∧ c∈{0,1,2}}
  Board≜Map(Position → Cell)
  Line≜{[p₁,p₂,p₃] | p₁,p₂,p₃∈Position}
  WinLines≜{
    [(0,0),(0,1),(0,2)], [(1,0),(1,1),(1,2)], [(2,0),(2,1),(2,2)],
    [(0,0),(1,0),(2,0)], [(0,1),(1,1),(2,1)], [(0,2),(1,2),(2,2)],
    [(0,0),(1,1),(2,2)], [(0,2),(1,1),(2,0)]
  }
  MoveResult≜{Valid(Board), Invalid(String)}
  GameStatus≜{Ongoing, Won(Player), Draw}
  GameState≜{board:Board, turn:Player, status:GameStatus}
}

⟦Γ:Rules⟧{
  ∀b:Board: |dom(b)| = 9
  ∀p:Position: p∈dom(b)

  R1: validMove≜λ(b,pos,p).
    board(b,pos) = Empty
    ∧ pos∈{(r,c)|r∈{0,1,2}∧c∈{0,1,2}}

  R2: ∀l∈WinLines, ∀p:Player:
    (∀pos∈l: board(b,pos) = Marked(p)) ⇒ wins(p,b)

  R3: draw(b) ≜
    (¬∃p:Player: wins(p,b))
    ∧ (∀pos∈dom(b): board(b,pos) ≠ Empty)

  R4: ∀g:GameState:
    g.status = Ongoing ⇒
      ∃pos:Position: board(g.board,pos) = Empty

  R5: opponent≜λ(p). p=X ⇒ O | p=O ⇒ X

  R6: turnAlternation≜
    ∀g:GameState: g.status=Ongoing ⇒
      count(Marked(X),g.board) ∈
        {count(Marked(O),g.board), count(Marked(O),g.board)+1}
}

⟦Λ:Funcs⟧{
  emptyBoard≜λ().
    {(r,c)→Empty | r∈{0,1,2} ∧ c∈{0,1,2}}

  applyMove≜λ(b,pos,p).
    validMove(b,pos,p)
      → Valid(b⊕{pos→Marked(p)})
      | Invalid("Cell occupied or out of bounds")

  checkWinner≜λ(b).
    ∃l∈WinLines, ∃p:Player:
      (∀pos∈l: b(pos)=Marked(p))
        → Some(p)
        | None

  isGameOver≜λ(g:GameState).
    let w≜checkWinner(g.board) in
      w≠None   → Won(unwrap(w))
    | draw(g.board) → Draw
    | otherwise    → Ongoing

  nextState≜λ(g:GameState, pos:Position).
    g.status ≠ Ongoing → g
    | let res≜applyMove(g.board,pos,g.turn) in
        res=Invalid(e) → g
      | let b′≜unwrap(res) in
          GameState{
            board≜b′,
            turn≜opponent(g.turn),
            status≜isGameOver(GameState{board≜b′,turn≜g.turn,status≜Ongoing})
          }

  initialState≜λ().
    GameState{board≜emptyBoard(), turn≜X, status≜Ongoing}
}

⟦Ε⟧⟨δ≜0.92;φ≜100;τ≜◊⁺⁺⟩

[id:"spec-001", %%:1, ctx:"task-scheduler-spec"]
INF(@scheduler-spec>@consumer): #TypeDefs{

  Task: #Task{
    id: string,
    priority: 1..5,
    deadline: timestamp,
    status: #unassigned | #assigned | #complete,
    assigned_to: @Worker | _
  },

  Worker: #Worker{
    id: string,
    status: #idle | #busy,
    current_task: Task.id | _,
    capacity: 1
  }

}

[id:"spec-002", %%:1, re:"spec-001", ctx:"task-scheduler-spec"]
INF(@scheduler-spec>@consumer): #Rules{

  assignment_constraint:
    assign($task, $worker) <-
      $worker.status == #idle
      & $worker.current_task == _
      & $task.status == #unassigned,

  priority_ordering:
    prefer($task_a, $task_b) <-
      $task_a.priority < $task_b.priority
      | ($task_a.priority == $task_b.priority & $task_a.deadline < $task_b.deadline),

  single_task_invariant:
    forall($w: Worker) count($w.current_task) <= $w.capacity,

  assignment_effect:
    assign($task, $worker) ->
      set($task.status, #assigned)
      & set($task.assigned_to, $worker.id)
      & set($worker.status, #busy)
      & set($worker.current_task, $task.id)

}

[id:"spec-003", %%:1, re:"spec-002", ctx:"task-scheduler-spec"]
INF(@scheduler-spec>@consumer): #FunctionDefs{

  next_unassigned:
    next_unassigned($pool: [Task]) -> Task | _ <-
      filter($pool, ($t) -> $t.status == #unassigned)
      -> sort_by(($a, $b) ->
           $a.priority < $b.priority
           | ($a.priority == $b.priority & $a.deadline < $b.deadline))
      -> head()
      | _,

  schedule_next:
    schedule_next($pool: [Task], $workers: [Worker]) -> #assignment{task:Task, worker:Worker} | _ <-
      next_unassigned($pool) -> $t
      & filter($workers, ($w) -> $w.status == #idle) -> head() -> $w
      & ($t != _ & $w != _)
        -> assign($t, $w)
        -> #assignment{task:$t, worker:$w}
      | _

}

INF(@spec-agent>@requester): #TicTacToeSpec{types:[#Player{value:#X | #O}, #Cell{value:#Empty | #X | #O}, #Board{cells:[[Cell,Cell,Cell],[Cell,Cell,Cell],[Cell,Cell,Cell]]}, #Move{player:Player, row:0..2, col:0..2}, #GameState{board:Board, turn:Player}], rules:[valid_move($state,$move) <- inRange($move.row,0..2) & inRange($move.col,0..2) & equals(cellAt($state.board,$move.row,$move.col),#Empty) & equals($move.player,$state.turn) & equals(check_game_over($state.board),F), win($board,$player) <- line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[1,0],[1,1],[1,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[2,0],[2,1],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[1,0],[2,0]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,1],[1,1],[2,1]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,2],[1,2],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,0],[1,1],[2,2]) | line_owned($board,$player,[0,2],[1,1],[2,0]), draw($board) <- board_full($board) & equals(win($board,#X),F) & equals(win($board,#O),F)], functions:[check_game_over($board) -> win($board,#X) | win($board,#O) | board_full($board)]}

INF(@spec-agent>@task-orchestrator): #TaskSchedulingSpec{types:[#Task{id:string, priority:1..5, deadline:number, assignedTo:string|_}, #Worker{id:string, assignedTask:string|_}], rules:[assign($task,$worker,$tasks) <- $worker.assignedTask = _ & $task.assignedTo = _, assign($task,$worker,$tasks) <- $task = nextUnassignedHighestPriorityTask($tasks), assign($task,$worker,$tasks) -> setWorkerTask($worker,$task) & setTaskWorker($task,$worker)], functions:[isUnassigned($task) -> $task.assignedTo = _, nextUnassignedHighestPriorityTask($tasks) -> first(orderBy(filter($tasks, isUnassigned), "priority:desc", "deadline:asc"))]}
